raw:
## Completed
Fixed the reviewer-blocking scope issues: reverted the unrelated dashboard/statusline changes, leaving only the DoD rationale threading changes and `ship_test.sh` coverage.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/foreman/index.ts` - threads `doneSummary` into release commit action and persists `doneness.checklist` in `done_evaluated`
- `extensions/foreman/ship.ts` - appends optional DoD summary to commit body without changing legacy output
- `extensions/foreman/test/ship_test.sh` - asserts both backward-compatible and DoD-summary commit messages

## How To Verify
`bash extensions/foreman/test/ship_test.sh && grep -q "claude-opus-4-8:xhigh" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/reviewer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/done_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gate_flow_test.sh`

## Notes
Ran the full command above successfully. `git diff --name-only -- extensions/foreman` now shows only the three intended files. Gate 2 auto-commit for this task should now include the Definition of Done block as a live demonstration.
